validation_velocity.validation_model: 10 custdev interviews + 2 pilot asks + 1 paid pilot proposal
validation_velocity.binary_pass_signal: At least 2 qualified buyers accept a paid or structured pilot conversation within the test window.
validation_velocity.binary_kill_signal: No qualified buyer accepts a pilot conversation or pilot proposal within the test window.
validation_velocity.derivation_basis: Protocol-derived from segment, approval-route complexity, buyer motion, and current validation/citation gaps.
validation_velocity.notes: validation queue severity 12; citation status ready

demand_pull.derivation_basis: Only offer structure and currently sourced competitor/numeric claims are available. SEMrush, paid search, and traffic observables are intentionally missing.
demand_pull.notes: Retention structure is filled from the product format. Demand, WTP, CAC, macro, and channel-fit remain unfilled until SEMrush and distribution evidence are collected.

regulatory_context.derivation_basis: Derived from confirmed regulatory requirements, approval entities, and current contradiction/risk density in the evidence-backed card.
regulatory_context.notes: 2 high-severity risk flags remain in the current card

collapsed_scores.confidence_reason: Validation velocity is partially populated, but founder-independence, demand observables, and SEMrush-backed pull metrics are still missing.
